summary: Gruber reports that his Daring Fireball membership drive is just one pixel short of its fundraising goal, with only hours remaining. He thanks supporters for a late-week boost in signups and notes he'll likely reach the goal through continued t-shirt sales. An update confirms he made the goal. The remainder of the post provides practical sizing details for the three Daring Fireball t-shirt designs available to members.
key_points: The membership drive reached 97% of its goal with hours to spare, literally one pixel short on the progress graph
A late-week boost in signups helped close the gap, and he ultimately hit the goal by Saturday morning
Three t-shirt designs were available: a charcoal 'classic,' a black 'Your PC is a POS,' and an 'I Love DF' ringer tee
money_quotes: I swear, with no fudging at all, it's *one pixel* short of my goal.
97 percent of the way there — that's pretty good.
It'd be nice to get that pixel and hit the goal before the drive officially closes.
key_insight: Gruber's membership drive to go full-time with Daring Fireball came down to the wire but succeeded, marking a milestone in independent web publishing as a viable career.
